sources.title: github/awesome-copilot — Community collection of Copilot customization resources
sources.whyItMatters: Official GitHub-maintained curated list of learning resources, example agents, skills, instructions, and community tools for Copilot customization. Includes shared skills that can be imported directly.

sources.title: microsoft/PowerToys — PlanIssue.agent.md
sources.whyItMatters: Rich real-world agent example with tools list, handoffs to FixIssue agent, stopping_rules pattern, structured planning phases, and parameter extraction from issues. Demonstrates production agent+handoff patterns.

sources.title: desktop/desktop — deskocat.agent.md
sources.whyItMatters: Production agent showing 5-phase workflow (Understand→Plan→Implement→Verify→Open PR), risk classification tiers, Given-When-Then acceptance criteria, and explicit stopping rules with build verification commands.

sources.title: dotnet/macios — copilot-instructions.md
sources.whyItMatters: Effective always-on instruction example: repository overview, key directories, build commands (Make-based), platform-specific notes, and binding pattern examples. Shows how to give Copilot project context without bloat.

sources.title: awesome-copilot — agents.instructions.md (guidelines for writing agents)
sources.whyItMatters: Community-maintained meta-instructions that teach Copilot how to write good .agent.md files. Covers YAML frontmatter fields, role definition, tool constraints, and handoff patterns.

sources.title: awesome-copilot — agent-skills.instructions.md
sources.whyItMatters: Template for creating well-structured SKILL.md files including frontmatter, resource organization, progressive loading patterns, and the distinction between skills and instructions.

sources.title: awesome-copilot — instructions.instructions.md
sources.whyItMatters: Meta-instructions for writing .instructions.md files: applyTo patterns, naming conventions, when to use instructions vs agents vs skills.

sources.title: awesome-copilot — prompt.instructions.md
sources.whyItMatters: Template for .prompt.md files: frontmatter fields (agent field replaces deprecated mode field), argument-hint usage, tool restrictions, and when to use prompts vs skills.

sources.title: awesome-copilot — prompt-builder skill
sources.whyItMatters: Shared skill for generating prompt files. Demonstrates the skill packaging pattern: SKILL.md + bundled resources in a folder structure.

sources.title: awesome-copilot — github-copilot-starter skill
sources.whyItMatters: Starter skill for onboarding to Copilot customization. Shows how to package a multi-resource skill with progressive loading.

sources.title: awesome-copilot — make-skill-template
sources.whyItMatters: Template skill for creating new skills. Documents the standard skill folder structure and SKILL.md frontmatter expectations.

sources.title: anthropics/skills — Anthropic's shared skills collection
sources.whyItMatters: Cross-vendor skill collection (compatible with both VS Code Copilot and Claude). Shows the Agent Skills open standard in practice.

sources.title: agentskills.io — Agent Skills open standard
sources.whyItMatters: Cross-tool skill standard (VS Code, Claude, etc.) defining SKILL.md format, folder structure, discovery patterns, and progressive loading contract.
